name: gelato-marketplace
description: Single-plugin marketplace for Gelato — the dogmatic Claude Code kit for modern full-stack TypeScript. A Neopolitan product.

plugins.name: gelato
plugins.description: The dogmatic, eval-verified Claude Code kit for modern full-stack TypeScript. 32 skills covering foundations, data, server, UI, testing, performance, SEO, security, observability, analytics, and deployment — each with methodology citations, deterministic classifier evals, and live LLM-as-judge rubrics.
